fields.label: Warranty Issuer Company
fields.description: The company that issues warranty/VAS plans to customers.

fields.label: Service Provider Company
fields.description: The company that performs repairs and services.

fields.label: Anniversary Plan Threshold (Months)
fields.description: Plans with duration >= this value are classified as 'anniversary_warranty'. Plans below this are classified as 'vas_plan'. Set to 0 to disable auto-classification (use plan-level override instead).

fields.label: Post-Repair Warranty (Months)
fields.description: Months of warranty issued after a successful repair (Service Warranty Register). Applies to claims closed under anniversary/VAS/paid plans.

fields.label: Paid Repair Defaults
fields.description: Default fee calculation for claims with no warranty coverage (paid_repair). These apply when the plan has no fee rules configured.

fields.label: Paid Repair Fee %
fields.description: Default processing fee as percentage of estimated repair cost for paid repairs.

fields.label: Paid Repair Fee Minimum
fields.description: Minimum processing fee for paid repairs (floor). Applied when percentage yields a lower amount.

fields.label: Paid Repair Fee Maximum
fields.description: Maximum processing fee cap for paid repairs. 0 = no cap.

fields.label: Fee Waiver Approval Roles
fields.default:
Sales Manager
CH Warranty Manager
System Manager
fields.description: Roles that can directly approve processing fee waivers (one per line). Users without these roles must submit an exception request.

fields.label: Auto-Approve Threshold
fields.description: Claims with GoGizmo share <= this amount are auto-approved without manager review. 0 = always require approval per plan rules.

fields.label: Claim Notification Roles
fields.description: Users holding one of these roles receive new online warranty claim notifications. Enter one role per line.

fields.label: Online Claim Response SLA (Hours)
fields.description: Response time shown to customers after an online claim is registered.

fields.label: VAS Voucher Configuration
fields.description: Controls how vouchers are auto-generated when a VAS plan is sold.

fields.label: Voucher Face Value
fields.description: Amount per voucher. floor(VAS price ÷ this value) = number of vouchers issued. E.g. ₹2000 → VAS worth ₹4000 generates 2 vouchers.

fields.label: Voucher Validity (Days)
fields.description: Days from issue date after which unused vouchers auto-expire.

fields.label: Redeemable On (Item Group)
fields.description: Restrict VAS vouchers to this item group (e.g. Accessories). Leave blank for all items.

fields.label: Redeemable Channel
fields.description: Restrict VAS voucher redemption to this channel. Leave blank for all channels.

fields.label: Processing Fee Payment Gateway
fields.description: Configure online payment gateway for processing fee collection. Leave blank to use manual/offline payment.

fields.label: Gateway Provider
fields.description: Payment gateway provider for processing fee collection links.

fields.label: Merchant ID / Key ID
fields.description: Razorpay: Key ID. Cashfree: App ID. PayU: Merchant Key.

fields.label: API Secret Key
fields.description: Razorpay: Key Secret. Cashfree: Secret Key. PayU: Salt.

fields.label: Webhook Secret
fields.description: Used to verify HMAC signature on gateway callbacks.
Dedicated HMAC secret for customer processing-fee links. Payment links fail closed when this is empty.
fields.label: Processing Fee Link Secret

fields.description: Hours after which a processing-fee link expires.
fields.label: Processing Fee Link Validity (Hours)

fields.description: Exact HTTPS hostnames permitted for Razorpay order creation, one per line.
fields.label: Razorpay Allowed Hosts

fields.description: Exact HTTPS hostnames permitted for Cashfree order creation, one per line.
fields.label: Cashfree Allowed Hosts

fields.description: Maximum response body accepted from a payment gateway.
fields.label: Gateway Response Maximum Bytes
GL Accounts
fields.description: Accounts used when creating journal entries for warranty fee payments.

fields.label: Processing Fee Revenue Account
fields.description: Credited when a warranty processing fee is marked as paid (Dr Cash/Bank → Cr this account).

fields.label: Processing Fee Receivable Account
fields.description: Debited when fee is marked paid via cash. Leave blank to use Company default cash account.
